recommendations.title: The Flu
recommendations.overview: A case of the flu quickly morphs into a pandemic. As the death toll mounts and the living panic, the government plans extreme measures to contain it.

recommendations.title: Asura: The City of Madness
recommendations.overview: A shady cop finds himself in over his head when he gets caught between Internal Affairs and the city’s corrupt mayor.

recommendations.title: The Warrior

recommendations.title: Hijack 1971
recommendations.overview: In the year 1971, former Korean Air Force fighter pilot Tae-In (Ha Jung-Woo) works as a pilot for a commercial airline. He faces a crisis inside a hijacked flight with the passengers, including Yong-Dae (Yeo Jin-Goo), and his crew members, including

recommendations.title: The Outlaws
recommendations.overview: In Chinatown, law and order is turned upside down when a trio of feral Chinese gangsters arrive, start terrorizing civilians, and usurping territory. The beleaguered local gangsters team up with the police, lead by the badass loose cannon Ma Seok-do,

recommendations.title: I Saw the Devil
recommendations.overview: Kyung-chul is a dangerous psychopath who kills for pleasure. Soo-hyeon, a top-secret agent, decides to track down the murderer himself. He promises himself that he will do everything in his power to take vengeance against the killer, even if it means

recommendations.title: The Call
recommendations.overview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.

recommendations.title: The Man from Nowhere
recommendations.overview: A reclusive pawnshop owner goes on a brutal rampage to rescue a young girl kidnapped by a criminal organization.

recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, My Brother
recommendations.overview: An action-dramatic biopic of the eponymous martial arts legend as told by his younger brother, Robert Lee. It revolves around Bruce Lee's life as a rebellious adolescent in Hong Kong before he sets off for the USA and conquers the world at the age of
recommendations.director: Manfred Wong Man-Chun, Raymond Yip Wai-Man

recommendations.title: Argentina 1985
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, a team of lawyers takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship in a battle against odds and a race against time.
